# ЗОРКО / ZORKO

ZORKO is an AI morning brief dashboard for small business owners.

## What it does
AI analyzes connected data sources (Google Places reviews, social media, sales data, weather) and delivers a personalized daily brief every morning with:
- Key business insights from the previous day
- Whispers: subtle signals and micro-insights worth watching
- Focus priority: one clear action to drive the day
- 7-day forecast based on trends

## Who it's for
Small business owners who don't have time to manually analyze data but need to stay on top of what's happening in their business. Particularly useful for: retail store owners, restaurant owners, service businesses (salons, clinics, repair shops).

## How it works
1. Connect data sources (Google Places reviews, sales, social)
2. Configure your morning brief preferences
3. Receive a daily AI-generated brief with insights, whispers, and focus priorities

## Pricing
- Free: 1 data source, 3 AI briefs/week, basic analytics, demo mode
- Pro: $19/month — unlimited connectors, daily AI briefs, real-time whispers, Focus mode, 7-day forecast
- 7-day free trial on Pro (no charge until day 7)

## Technical
- Built with Next.js 15, Supabase, Google Gemini AI
- Connector system: Google Places reviews, weather, sales (more connectors in roadmap: POS, inventory, Telegram, Google Calendar)

## Languages
Russian (primary), English

## URL
https://zorko-three.vercel.app

## Contact
For partnerships and integrations: https://zorko-three.vercel.app/about
